title.en: 3 Bedroom Condo for sale at Supalai Oriental Sukhumvit 39
title.zh: 3 Bedroom Condo for sale at Supalai Oriental Sukhumvit 39
title.th: 3 Bedroom Condo for sale at Supalai Oriental Sukhumvit 39

summary.zh: 出售：3卧，157㎡，24,657,000 泰铢。来源 DotProperty #3aeceabebe1b-d5e0-8b46-49d7-95e4772a。
summary.th: ขาย: 3 นอน 157 ตร.ม. ราคา 24,657,000 บาท (DotProperty #3aeceabebe1b-d5e0-8b46-49d7-95e4772a)

description.en:
Located in one of Bangkok’s most sought-after residential districts, this luxury three-bedroom residence at Supalai Oriental Sukhumvit 39 offers generous space, refined design, and strong investment potential.
Spanning an impressive 157.01 sqm, this thoughtfully designed home provides three bedrooms and three bathrooms, making it ideal for families, expatriate professionals, or investors seeking a high-quality asset in central Sukhumvit.
The residence showcases a modern architectural layout with premium finishing, creating a home that feels both elegant and highly functional. Large windows invite natural light throughout the living areas, while the carefully arranged floor plan ensures comfortable privacy between bedrooms and shared living spaces.
Fully air-conditioned and built with high-quality materials, the unit reflects Supalai’s commitment to durability, craftsmanship, and long-term value.
 Investment Highlight

Current ROI 5.84%
Currently rented at 120,000 THB/month
Tenant secured until 30 September 2026
Approx. 170,037 THB per sqm

This makes the property an attractive income-generating investment in a prime expatriate neighborhood.
 Property Highlights

3 Bedrooms | 3 Bath
